hero.title: Navigate the World with Independence
hero.subtitle: An advanced AI-powered assistant designed for the visually impaired. Understand your surroundings safely using just your smartphone and voice.

features.title: Powerful AI Capabilities
features.detection_desc: Instantly identifies people, doors, stairs, and everyday obstacles in your path using advanced computer vision.
features.ocr_desc: Advanced optical character recognition reads direction boards, room numbers, and warnings aloud.
features.voice_desc: Interact entirely hands-free. Just say "Hey SmartNav, what's in front of me?"
features.sos_desc: Instantly share your live location and alert caregivers via the connected dashboard during emergencies.

footer.desc: Empowering visually impaired individuals to navigate the world independently with state-of-the-art AI.

assistant.stopping: Stopping active assistance. I am still listening for the wake word.
assistant.error_command: I didn't catch that command. You can ask me to Launch Web App, Try Live Demo, or ask for help.
assistant.error_exec: Sorry, I encountered an error executing that command.
assistant.sos_activated: Emergency SOS activated. Contacting caregivers immediately.
assistant.speech_not_supported: Speech APIs not supported on this browser.
assistant.listening_paused: Listening paused. Say wake phrase or tap mic to resume.
